message:
fix(server): batch-drain replica stream, enforce output buffer limit on write path, and reformat inline parse block

Replica stream processing: drain_replica_stream now accumulates consumed_total
and drains once at the end (matching the client-side fix from the previous
commit), preventing O(k*n) memmove per frame in replication pipelines.

Write buffer limit: Adds validate_replica_write_buffer_limit() that checks
connection.write_buf against output_buffer_limit. Called after every follow-up
write in drain_replica_stream and before flush in drive_replica_sync, causing
overlimit connections to disconnect and retry rather than growing unbounded.

New test replica_stream_write_path_enforces_output_buffer_limit verifies that
setting output_buffer_limit=0 causes drain_replica_stream to fail when GETACK
generates a response that exceeds the limit.

Also reformats the inline vs RESP parse dispatch block to reduce nesting
(cosmetic only, matches rustfmt output).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
